hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=(d.get('tool_input') or {}).get('file_path',''); root=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR') or os.getcwd(); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'You edited CLAUDE.md \u2014 MIRROR RULE: make the equivalent change in .github/copilot-instructions.md (it drives GitHub Copilot review of every PR). Treat the change as incomplete until both files reflect it.'}})) if fp and os.path.normpath(os.path.join(root, fp)) == os.path.normpath(os.path.join(root, 'CLAUDE.md')) else None"
